title: Animal-rights activists release beagles from dog-breeding facility
description: Between 50 to 60 animal-rights activists broke into a dog-breeding facility on Ridglan Farms in Wisconsin.  The activists released more than 20 beagles that were set to be used for scientific testing. Ridglan Farms agreed to shut down their breeding-for-sale operation late last year after an investigation revealed non-vets performed eye surgeries on dogs at the facility without anaesthesia.  27 people were arrested for the facility break-in and have since been released. #animalrights #activists #ridglanfarms #dogbreeding
